news.t: Stone Ridge Expands LifeX Franchise: New ETFs for Bucketing Strategies Designed to Offer Predictable Cash Flow, Intending to Distribute ~$1,700 (BCKT)-$2,700 (LIFT) Monthly for Every $100,000 Investment (1)

overview.description: The LifeX 2028 Income Bucket ETF (LIFT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide predictable cashflows through 2028. The fund seeks fixed monthly distributions of $0.0833 per share. LIFT was launched on Sep 24, 2025 and is issued by Stone Ridge.

data.title: Stone Ridge Expands LifeX Franchise: New ETFs for Bucketing Strategies Designed to Offer Predictable Cash Flow, Intending to Distribute ~$1,700 (BCKT)-$2,700 (LIFT) Monthly for Every $100,000 Investment (1)
data.text: LIFT and BCKT are designed to help retirees plan confidently, delivering steady monthly cash flow over 3- and 5-year horizons regardless of interest rate moves
